final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive brand launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic with a translucent/luminous quality — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide-format cover slide layout with title and subtitle prominently placed
Subject: must include the car model "长安起源Q06" as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop that feels expansive and brand-premium — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually stunning, awe-inspiring atmosphere with a sense of depth and translucency — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand prestige — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of glass-like clarity and visual depth in the background treatment — exact surface execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title, large), "9月上市" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must preserve PPT cover proportions (16:9 widescreen), title and subtitle must be legible against the background
Avoid:
